Important: KYC Required

After registration, you'll need to complete KYC verification before you can start selling. This includes business verification and document upload.

This will be your store's display name

arolana.com/vendors/

Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

What happens next?

  • You'll receive access to your vendor dashboard
  • Complete KYC verification (business info + documents)
  • Browse and apply to represent manufacturers
  • Start listing products once verified
